# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: '16'
        cache: 'npm'

    - name: Install npm dependencies
      run: npm ci

    - name: Cache npm dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      with:
        path: ~/.npm
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-

    - name: Cache pip dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      with:
        path: ~/.cache/pip
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

    - name: Cache build outputs
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      with:
        path: build/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-build-

    - name: Cache configuration files
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      with:
        path: config/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ github.sha }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-config-

    - name: Cache environment-specific configs
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      with:
        path: |
          .env.local
          .env.development
          .env.production
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-env-${{ github.sha }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-env-

    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test

    - name: Build project
      run: npm run build
